book.title: Midnight Rain
book.description: An in-depth look at creating applications with XML.

book.author: Ralls, Kim
book.title: Midnight Rain
book.description: A former software engineer battles an ancient dread.

book.author: Corets, Eva
book.title: Maeve Ascendant
book.description: After the collapse of a minor kingdom, a new power arises.

book.author: Corets, Eva
book.title: Oberon's Legacy
book.description: In Ireland, an ancient druid stone is discovered.
